title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 166.455 - Funds not state revenues
text:
166.455.  Funds not state revenues. — Money accruing to and deposited in individual savings accounts shall not be part of "total state revenues" as defined in Sections 17 and 18 of Article X of the Constitution of the State of Missouri and the expenditure of such revenues shall not be an expense of state government under Section 20 of Article X of the Constitution of the State of Missouri.
(L. 1998 H.B. 1694, A.L. 1999 S.B. 460)
